label: About
title: About Gallery Seam Orbit
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 87 recent saved-signal files and 76 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around gallery and Anchor image material 1, plus 7 more. A source image from shopthegallery.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Gallery Seam Orbit: Abstract gallery-material orbit, fashion/material macro with oblique product-table grammar: one oversized cream woven surface cropped hard from the lower-left, warm golden side light, shallow shadows, catalog-white quiet space. Around it, nine source-bearing apertures appear as folded tabs, glossy photo slits, shade... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large dark glossy aperture inside woven textile, raised cream woven fold edge, and translucent curled canvas sheet with embedded dark image field.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
